management: Thumbnail A/B testing on all major uploads
Establish Vlog channel for secondary content

mediaAssets.strategy: Grid for trailers, Stories for posters, Reels for highlights and arcs
mediaAssets.goal: Stay top-of-mind and aligned with main streams and storylines
management: Put stories in highlights so people can go back

mediaAssets.strategy: Viral live-pushing and fast-paced stream clips
management: Have trends saved for immediate execution
creation: On stream TikTok with the collabs so people can go like and boost it in the algorithm real time

mediaAssets.strategy: "People forget that they forget." Run Weekly/Monthly recaps to maintain narrative memory.
management: Weekly recap threads posted every Monday morning
Monthly "Season Recap" videos posted on the 1st of the month

mediaAssets.goal: Daily touchpoints with people who already follow the story
management: Post 10-15 snaps daily to stay at the top of feeds
Point back to streams and arcs when it fits naturally
